methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Initializes the upgradeable proxy with an initial implementation specified by `_logic`.
     *
     * If `_data` is nonempty, it's used as data in a delegate call to `_logic`. This will typically be an encoded
     * function call, and allows initializating the storage of the proxy like a Solidity constructor.
     */
/**
     * @dev Emitted when the implementation is upgraded.
     */
/**
     * @dev Storage slot with the address of the current implementation.
     * This is the keccak-256 hash of "eip1967.proxy.implementation" subtracted by 1, and is
     * validated in the constructor.
     */
/**
     * @dev Returns the current implementation address.
     */

/**
     * @dev Upgrades the proxy to a new implementation.
     *
     * Emits an {Upgraded} event.
     */

/**
     * @dev Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call
     * `onlyOwner` functions anymore. Can only be called by the current owner.
     *
     * > Note: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner,
     * thereby removing any functionality that is only available to the owner.
     */

/**
     * @dev Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`).
     * Can only be called by the current owner.
     */

methods.full_signature: function getProxyImplementation(TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy) public virtual view returns (address)
methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Returns the current implementation of `proxy`.
     *
     * Requirements:
     *
     * - This contract must be the admin of `proxy`.
     */

methods.full_signature: function getProxyAdmin(TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy) public virtual view returns (address)
methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Returns the current admin of `proxy`.
     *
     * Requirements:
     *
     * - This contract must be the admin of `proxy`.
     */

methods.full_signature: function changeProxyAdmin(TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address newAdmin) public virtual
methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Changes the admin of `proxy` to `newAdmin`.
     *
     * Requirements:
     *
     * - This contract must be the current admin of `proxy`.
     */

methods.full_signature: function upgrade(TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address implementation) public virtual
methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Upgrades `proxy` to `implementation`. See {TransparentUpgradeableProxy-upgradeTo}.
     *
     * Requirements:
     *
     * - This contract must be the admin of `proxy`.
     */

methods.parameters: TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address implementation, bytes memory data
methods.signature: upgradeAndCallTransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address implementation, bytes memory data
methods.full_signature: function upgradeAndCall(TransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address implementation, bytes memory data) public virtual payable
methods.class_method_signature: ProxyAdmin.upgradeAndCallTransparentUpgradeableProxy proxy, address implementation, bytes memory data
methods.comment:
/**
     * @dev Upgrades `proxy` to `implementation` and calls a function on the new implementation. See
     * {TransparentUpgradeableProxy-upgradeToAndCall}.
     *
     * Requirements:
     *
     * - This contract must be the admin of `proxy`.
     */
